pitch: Startup graph for universities and VCs that maps spinouts, people, grants, patents, and traction.
problem: Ecosystem teams spend weeks stitching together fragmented startup data and miss promising spinouts early.

targetUser.primary: University innovation offices and seed investors

solution: A normalized company graph, alerts, and diligence workspace for spinouts and local ecosystems.

whyNow.point: Universities and ecosystem builders are buying better startup intelligence.
signalRefs: Startup intelligence and spinout commercialization are getting institutional backing

whyNow.point: Spinout commercialization is getting more structured support and funding.
signalRefs: Startup intelligence and spinout commercialization are getting institutional backing

differentiator: Research-to-company pipeline visibility with entity resolution and ecosystem-specific signals.

conceptDiagram.title: Spinout discovery loop
conceptDiagram.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  Sources --> Graph --> Alerts
  Graph --> Diligence
  Diligence --> Sources

signalStrength.rationale: Backed by institutional demand for startup data and commercialization support.

painIntensity.rationale: Discovery and diligence are labor intensive and recurring.

wedgeClarity.rationale: Clear buyer and use case inside institutions.

defensibility.rationale: Moat depends on data coverage and graph quality.

ventureScale.rationale: Expandable into broader ecosystem intelligence workflows.

topRisks.name: Data fragmentation
topRisks.description: Signals may be incomplete or inconsistent.
topRisks.mitigation: Start with narrow ecosystems and high-quality sources.

topRisks.name: Long sales cycles
topRisks.mitigation: Lead with pilots and high-value niche workflows.
